---
title: "Visualization & Communication"
description: "Publication-ready ggplot2, plotly, game trees, network graphs, dashboards."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="visualization-and-communication"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Visualization & Communication</h1>
  <p class="lead">Publication-ready ggplot2, plotly, game trees, network graphs, dashboards.</p>
</div>
```
